_note: Skool's DOM is undocumented and changes. These selectors are the ONE place to fix when a read breaks. Run `npm run probe` to see what the page actually exposes, then update these. Every value here is a best-guess starting point and MUST be confirmed on the first live run.

applicationAnswer._note: Application answers usually are NOT on the directory list. They show in a member's profile or in the pending/approval view. Confirm where they live before enabling captureAnswers.
